gitCommit.subject: fix: remove unnecessary addToActiveCart dep from useCallback (unblock build)
gitCommit.body:
fix: remove unnecessary addToActiveCart dep from useCallback (unblock build)

The previous bot commit (fae24fe) added addToActiveCart to the dependency
array of handleVariantComplete in ProductCard.tsx and ProductListItem.tsx,
but the callback body never references it. This produced 2 new
react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings that broke the ESLint baseline gate,
failing all production deploys.

Validated: typecheck 0 errors, lint:baseline back to 0 errors/0 warnings,
vite transform of all 5766 modules OK.
